import React from "react"; import "./Profile.css"; import GitHubLogo from "../Logo/GitHubLogo.svg"; import TelegramLogo from "../Logo/TelegramLogo.svg"; import GmailLogo from "../Logo/GmailLogo.png"; import LinkedInLogo from "../Logo/LinkedInLogo.svg"; const Profile = ({ name = "Giuseppe Pedone", role = "AI Systems Engineer", profilePhoto = "/profile.jpg", education = [ { year: "2020", title: "MSc Computer Engineering", place: "University XYZ" }, { year: "2017", title: "BSc Computer Science", place: "University XYZ" } ], workTimeline = [ { year: "2024", title: "AI Researcher", company: "AISIF Project" }, { year: "2023", title: "System Developer", company: "Linux Integration Lab" }, { year: "2022", title: "Backend Developer", company: "Tech Company" } ], scientificInterests = [ "Artificial Intelligence", "Operating Systems", "Distributed Systems", "System Performance Optimization" ], collaborations = [ "Open Source Community", "Linux Developers", "AI Research Labs" ], linkedinURL = "https://linkedin.com", githubURL = "https://github.com", telegramURL = "https://telegram.me/", gmailURL = "mailto:example@gmail.com" }) => { return (

{name}

{role}

Education

{education.map((edu, index) => (
{edu.year}
{edu.title}

{edu.place}

))}

Job History

{workTimeline.map((job, index) => (
{job.year} {job.title}

{job.company}

))}

Scientific Interests

{scientificInterests.map((interest, index) => ( {interest} ))}

Companies and Collaborations

    {collaborations.map((item, index) => (
  • {item}
    • ))}

Contacts

LinkedIn ↗ GitHub ↗ Telegram ↗ Gmail ↗
); }; export default Profile;
